name: codegraph_get_module_summary
description: Get a high-level summary of a module or directory — file count, function count, language breakdown, top complex functions, and external dependencies. Great for understanding unfamiliar code areas.

path.description: Absolute directory path to summarize (e.g. /workspace/src/auth). All graph nodes whose file path starts with this prefix are included.

top_n.description: How many of the most-complex functions to include in the result (default: 5)
